name: claude-vision-image-parser
description: Generic Claude Vision wrapper: take an image (multipart upload or Buffer) + a prompt, get back parsed JSON. Includes a schedule-import implementation as a reference; bring your own prompt for invoices, receipts, timesheets, forms, etc.

envVars.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your Anthropic API key. Get one at https://console.anthropic.com/.

endpoints: POST /api/schedule-import — FormData {image, year?, month?} → {shifts: [{date, startTime, endTime}]} (reference implementation, optional)

postInstall: 2. parseImageWithClaude is the core helper — pass a Buffer/base64, the media type, and your prompt
3. Tell Claude to return ONLY JSON in your prompt — the helper strips ```json fences but won't recover from prose around the JSON
4. The reference schedule route uses claude-haiku-4-5 (cheapest); bump to Sonnet/Opus for harder tables. Pass `model` in opts.
5. Defaults: 2048 max tokens, no streaming. Override via `opts` if you need more.
